features: Specification：Maximum 90 W​ ​Universal Laptop Charger Multi-Voltage: Input AC100-240V, 50-60Hz; Output 15V6.0A 16V5.6A 18.5V4.9A 19V4.74A 19.5V4.62A 20V4.5A pay attention to：Not suitable for USB C interface

Universal Laptop Charger: There are 14 different connectors for most laptops HP Lenovo Dell Acer Asus Samsung ​ Sony To-shiba Supply Ultrabook, as long as your laptop's connector belongs to one of these 14 headers, it will work

14 DC power connectors: 5.5X 2.5mm 5.5 X 3.0mm6.5X4.4mm7.4X 5.0mm 11.0X 5.0mm,7.9X 5.4mm, 7..4X5.0mm 4.0 X 1.7mm 3.0X 1.0mm 4.0X1.35mm 5.5 X 1.7mm 4.5mmX3.0mm4.5mm*3.0mm 4.8X1.7mm,multi-head charger allows you to easily connect different laptop models

compatible with: Lenovo ThinkPad Yoga Chromebook IdeaPad, HP Elitebook Elite Spectre Chromebook Pavilion Envy Touch SmartBook, Dell Inspiron Latitude XPS Vostro, ASUS Vivobook Zenbook Vivobook, Acer Chromebook Aspire, To-shiba Satellite, Medion Akoya, Sony VAIO, etc

​Safety certification: Universal AC adapter is made of flame retardant and waterproof materials, with short-circuit protection, overcharge protection, temperature protection, and meets UKCA/ETL/FCC/CE/RoHS standards
​Service: To make sure you buy with confidence, we offer 30-day refund/12-month replacement/24 X 7 email support.If you have any questions and assistance, please feel free to consult the service
